title: Multiple emails to a board

posts.author: masonmay (Mason May)
posts.cookedHtml:
The email to board feature is amazing, and can have many different applications.

If you are an agency that manages multiple vendors, it would be awesome to create multiple emails for a single project management board. Each additional email would create its own group within that board, where its items would be sent.

That way, you could give one vendor a specific email, and another vendor a different email to automatically populate tasks into the proper groups.
